title: Merchant Charge & Billing Plans
description: This section covers the APIs used to create, update, and retrieve charges associated with a merchant, as well as manage billing plans for partners. Charges can be one-time or subscription-based, while billing plans define pricing structures for different payment methods and card brands.

apis.heading: Create Merchant Charge
apis.description: Creates a new charge for a merchant. Partners can specify the charge details.

reqParams.name: description
reqParams.description: A brief description of the charge.

reqParams.name: currency
reqParams.description: Three-digit currency code

reqParams.name: amount
reqParams.description: Charge amount in smallest currency units

reqParams.name: vat
reqParams.description: Optional VAT amount.

reqParams.name: billingDate
reqParams.description: Date on which the charge is effective, in yyyy-mm-dd format.

reqParams.name: recurring
reqParams.description: If set, defines a recurring charge schedule including frequency and optional end date.

reqParams.name: frequency
reqParams.description: Specifies how frequently the charge will be billed. The possible values are:

possibleValues.description: Recurring charge occurs every day.
Recurring charge occurs twice a week.
Recurring charge occurs once per week.
Recurring charge occurs once every 10 days.
Recurring charge occurs once every two weeks.
Recurring charge occurs once per month.
Recurring charge occurs once every two months.
Recurring charge occurs every three months.
Recurring charge occurs once every quarter (three months).
Recurring charge occurs twice a year.
Recurring charge occurs once a year.

reqParams.name: billingEndDate
reqParams.description: Date in yyyy-mm-dd format specifying when to stop recurring charges.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Indicates if the request was 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data containing information about the created charge.

resParams.name: chargeId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the newly created charge.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message describing the outcome of the request.

apis.heading: Update Merchant Charge
apis.description: Updates an existing charge for a merchant. Partners can modify the amount, VAT, and optionally adjust the recurring settings.

reqParams.name: amount
reqParams.description: Updated amount in minor currency units.

reqParams.name: vat
reqParams.description: Optional updated VAT amount.

reqParams.name: recurring
reqParams.description: Updated recurring schedule. Billing end date and updateType can be specified here.

reqParams.name: updateType
reqParams.description: Indicates the type of the update.The possible values are

possibleValues.description: Applies the update to the next billing cycle only.
Applies the update for the remaining lifetime of the subscription.
Applies the update immediately to the current billing cycle.

reqParams.name: billingEndDate
reqParams.description: Date in yyyy-mm-dd format specifying the new end date for the recurring charge.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Indicates if the request was 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message describing the outcome of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch Merchant Charge by ID
apis.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific merchant charge, including subscription details, amount, VAT, frequency, and any associated sub-charges.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data containing details of the requested merchant charge

resParams.name: isSubscriptionCharge
resParams.description: Specifies if this charge is subscription-based (recurring).

resParams.name: description
resParams.description: A short description of the charge.

resParams.name: amount
resParams.description: Charge amount in smallest currency units.

resParams.name: vat
resParams.description: The VAT amount applied to this charge.

resParams.name: frequency
resParams.description: Specifies how frequently the charge will be billed. The possible values are:

possibleValues.description: Recurring charge occurs every day.
Recurring charge occurs twice a week.
Recurring charge occurs once per week.
Recurring charge occurs once every 10 days.
Recurring charge occurs once every two weeks.
Recurring charge occurs once per month.
Recurring charge occurs once every two months.
Recurring charge occurs every three months.
Recurring charge occurs once every quarter (three months).
Recurring charge occurs twice a year.
Recurring charge occurs once a year.
Recurring charge does not follow a fixed schedule.

resParams.name: billingStartDate
resParams.description: Start date of the recurring charge in ISO 8601 format.

resParams.name: billingEndDate
resParams.description: End date of the recurring charge in ISO 8601 format.

resParams.name: subCharges
resParams.description: Array of sub-charges associated with this main charge.

resParams.name: chargeId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for this sub-charge.

resParams.name: description
resParams.description: A short text describing the sub-charge.

resParams.name: amount
resParams.description: Charge amount in smallest currency units

resParams.name: vat
resParams.description: VAT amount for this sub-charge.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Current status of the sub-charge.

resParams.name: billingDate
resParams.description: Date when this sub-charge was billed, in ISO 8601 format.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch All Merchant Charges
apis.description: Retrieves a list of all charges associated with a particular merchant. This includes both one-time and subscription-based charges.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: An array of merchant charges.

resParams.name: chargeId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the charge.

resParams.name: subChargeId
resParams.description: Identifier specifically tied to the sub-charge, usually the same as 'id' for single charges.

resParams.name: merchantId
resParams.description: The merchant ID to whom this charge applies.

resParams.name: isSubscriptionCharge
resParams.description: Indicates whether this charge is part of a subscription (recurring).

resParams.name: description
resParams.description: A brief text describing the charge.

resParams.name: amount
resParams.description: Charge amount in smallest currency units.

resParams.name: vat
resParams.description: VAT amount applied to this charge.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Current status of the charge, for example 'PENDING'.

resParams.name: billingDate
resParams.description: Date the charge is billed, in ISO 8601 format.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message describing the status of the request.

apis.heading: Create Billing Plans
apis.description: Creates new billing plans for a partner. Billing plans define pricing structures for different payment methods, card brands, and terminal types.

reqParams.name: plans
reqParams.description: Array of billing plan objects to create.

reqParams.name: id
reqParams.description: Unique identifier for the billing plan.

reqParams.name: cardBrand
reqParams.description: Card brand for which this plan applies (e.g., VISA, MASTERCARD, DISCOVER).

reqParams.name: terminalType
reqParams.description: Type of terminal for which this plan applies (e.g., STANDARD).

reqParams.name: paymentMethod
reqParams.description: Payment method for which this plan applies (e.g., CARD).

reqParams.name: planType
reqParams.description: Type of billing plan.

possibleValues.description: Fixed percentage or amount pricing.
Variable pricing based on transaction type.

reqParams.name: description
reqParams.description: Description of the billing plan.

reqParams.name: domesticDebitNonCommercial
reqParams.description: Percentage rate for domestic debit non-commercial transactions.

reqParams.name: domesticCreditNonCommercial
reqParams.description: Percentage rate for domestic credit non-commercial transactions.

reqParams.name: domesticDebitCommercial
reqParams.description: Percentage rate for domestic debit commercial transactions.

reqParams.name: domesticCreditCommercial
reqParams.description: Percentage rate for domestic credit commercial transactions.

reqParams.name: eeaDebitNonCommercial
reqParams.description: Percentage rate for EEA debit non-commercial transactions.

reqParams.name: eeaCreditNonCommercial
reqParams.description: Percentage rate for EEA credit non-commercial transactions.

reqParams.name: eeaDebitCommercial
reqParams.description: Percentage rate for EEA debit commercial transactions.

reqParams.name: eeaCreditCommercial
reqParams.description: Percentage rate for EEA credit commercial transactions.

reqParams.name: internationalDebitNonCommercial
reqParams.description: Percentage rate for international debit non-commercial transactions.

reqParams.name: internationalCreditNonCommercial
reqParams.description: Percentage rate for international credit non-commercial transactions.

reqParams.name: internationalDebitCommercial
reqParams.description: Percentage rate for international debit commercial transactions.

reqParams.name: internationalCreditCommercial
reqParams.description: Percentage rate for international credit commercial transactions.

reqParams.name: minimumCeiling
reqParams.description: Minimum ceiling amount for transactions.

reqParams.name: fixedCost
reqParams.description: Fixed cost amount per transaction.

reqParams.name: fixedPercentage
reqParams.description: Fixed percentage rate applied to transactions.

reqParams.name: vatPercentage
reqParams.description: VAT percentage applied to the billing plan.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Indicates if the request was 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message describing the outcome of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch Billing Plans
apis.description: Retrieves all billing plans associated with a partner. Returns detailed information about each plan including pricing structures for different transaction types. Supports pagination through page number headers.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Array of billing plan objects.

resParams.name: billingPlanId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the billing plan.

resParams.name: cardBrand
resParams.description: Card brand for which this plan applies.

resParams.name: terminalType
resParams.description: Type of terminal for which this plan applies.

resParams.name: paymentMethod
resParams.description: Payment method for which this plan applies.

resParams.name: planType
resParams.description: Type of billing plan (FIXED or VARIABLE).

resParams.name: description
resParams.description: Description of the billing plan.

resParams.name: domesticDebitNonCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for domestic debit non-commercial transactions.

resParams.name: domesticCreditNonCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for domestic credit non-commercial transactions.

resParams.name: domesticDebitCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for domestic debit commercial transactions.

resParams.name: domesticCreditCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for domestic credit commercial transactions.

resParams.name: eeaDebitNonCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for EEA debit non-commercial transactions.

resParams.name: eeaCreditNonCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for EEA credit non-commercial transactions.

resParams.name: eeaDebitCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for EEA debit commercial transactions.

resParams.name: eeaCreditCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for EEA credit commercial transactions.

resParams.name: internationalDebitNonCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for international debit non-commercial transactions.

resParams.name: internationalCreditNonCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for international credit non-commercial transactions.

resParams.name: internationalDebitCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for international debit commercial transactions.

resParams.name: internationalCreditCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for international credit commercial transactions.

resParams.name: minimumCeiling
resParams.description: Minimum ceiling amount for transactions.

resParams.name: fixedCost
resParams.description: Fixed cost amount per transaction.

resParams.name: fixedPercentage
resParams.description: Fixed percentage rate applied to transactions.

resParams.name: vatPercentage
resParams.description: VAT percentage applied to the billing plan.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message describing the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch Billing Plans for Merchant
apis.description: Retrieves billing plans specifically assigned to a merchant under a partner. This endpoint returns the billing plans that are applicable to the specified merchant.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Array of billing plan objects assigned to the merchant.

resParams.name: billingPlanId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the billing plan.

resParams.name: cardBrand
resParams.description: Card brand for which this plan applies.

resParams.name: terminalType
resParams.description: Type of terminal for which this plan applies.

resParams.name: paymentMethod
resParams.description: Payment method for which this plan applies.

resParams.name: planType
resParams.description: Type of billing plan (FIXED or VARIABLE).

resParams.name: description
resParams.description: Description of the billing plan.

resParams.name: domesticDebitNonCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for domestic debit non-commercial transactions.

resParams.name: domesticCreditNonCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for domestic credit non-commercial transactions.

resParams.name: domesticDebitCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for domestic debit commercial transactions.

resParams.name: domesticCreditCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for domestic credit commercial transactions.

resParams.name: eeaDebitNonCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for EEA debit non-commercial transactions.

resParams.name: eeaCreditNonCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for EEA credit non-commercial transactions.

resParams.name: eeaDebitCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for EEA debit commercial transactions.

resParams.name: eeaCreditCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for EEA credit commercial transactions.

resParams.name: internationalDebitNonCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for international debit non-commercial transactions.

resParams.name: internationalCreditNonCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for international credit non-commercial transactions.

resParams.name: internationalDebitCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for international debit commercial transactions.

resParams.name: internationalCreditCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for international credit commercial transactions.

resParams.name: minimumCeiling
resParams.description: Minimum ceiling amount for transactions.

resParams.name: fixedCost
resParams.description: Fixed cost amount per transaction.

resParams.name: fixedPercentage
resParams.description: Fixed percentage rate applied to transactions.

resParams.name: vatPercentage
resParams.description: VAT percentage applied to the billing plan.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message describing the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch Billing Plan by ID
apis.description: Fetch detailed information for a specific billing plan using its ID.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Array containing the filtered billing plan details.

resParams.name: billingPlanId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the billing plan.

resParams.name: paymentMethod
resParams.description: Payment method for which this plan applies.

resParams.name: cardBrand
resParams.description: Card brand for which this plan applies.

resParams.name: terminalType
resParams.description: Type of terminal for which this plan applies.

resParams.name: planType
resParams.description: Type of billing plan (FIXED or VARIABLE).

resParams.name: description
resParams.description: Description of the billing plan.

resParams.name: domesticDebitNonCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for domestic debit non-commercial transactions.

resParams.name: domesticCreditNonCommercial
resParams.description: Percentage rate for domestic credit non-commercial transactions.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message describing the status of the request.

apis.heading: Remove Billing Plan by ID
apis.description: Removes one or more billing plans by their IDs for a specific partner.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message describing the outcome of the removal operation.
